context_summary.original_problem: ENOENT errors from session journal writer targeting wrong paths
context_summary.root_cause: 3 handler factories passed project root to consolidated-writer instead of .hivemind/sessions; event-handler never called initSession; session ID mismatch (semantic vs raw SDK)
context_summary.fix_applied: Path fix + init-before-add logic + findSessionBySdkId return fix
context_summary.fix_verified: ENOENT errors stopped; new files created at .hivemind/sessions/ with correct paths
context_summary.structural_problem: Hundreds of flat JSON files with no hierarchy, no relationships, no readability
context_summary.solution_design: ADR-017: hierarchical session directory structure with human-readable events.md
